subcodes.first_line: O friend! Thou hast sought reunion, and thy right it is, for verily all have been created for the sake of attaining His presence; yet the transgressors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست لقا طلب نمودی و حق داری چه که کل از برای لقا خلق شده اند ولکن معتدین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
